summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be substantially implemented. REQ-2 (Actor not available fix) is clearly addressed in useQueries.ts and AddEntryPage.tsx. REQ-1 (label rename) is partially addressed — AddEntryPage.tsx renames to 'Favorite Location on the Trail' and EntryDetailPage.tsx renames to 'Favorite Trail Spot:' (not 'Favorite Location on the Trail'). The GuestbookFeedPage and EditEntryDialog label changes are not directly confirmed in the diff content.

missing_requirements.requirement: All other locations (detail page, feed badges, dialogs) that previously showed 'Favorite AT Location' now show 'Favorite Location on the Trail'
missing_requirements.reason: EntryDetailPage.tsx renames the label to 'Favorite Trail Spot:' per the file summary, not 'Favorite Location on the Trail' as required. GuestbookFeedPage changes are not confirmed in the diff content. EditEntryDialog label text is truncated and unconfirmed.
